series_metadata.series_description: Files created in the investigation of a misdemeanor case.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for two years after the offense is committed, when the case has exhausted all legal remedies, until no longer determined to be of evidentiary value, or otherwise required by law, whichever is longer, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
